{\rtf1\ansi\ansicpg1252\cocoartf2639
\cocoatextscaling0\cocoaplatform0{\fonttbl\f0\fswiss\fcharset0 Helvetica;\f1\fnil\fcharset0 LucidaGrande;\f2\fnil\fcharset134 PingFangSC-Regular;
}
{\colortbl;\red255\green255\blue255;}
{\*\expandedcolortbl;;}
\paperw11900\paperh16840\margl1440\margr1440\vieww11520\viewh8400\viewkind0
\pard\tx566\tx1133\tx1700\tx2267\tx2834\tx3401\tx3968\tx4535\tx5102\tx5669\tx6236\tx6803\pardirnatural\partightenfactor0

\f0\fs24 \cf0 <!DOCTYPE html>\
<html lang="it">\
<head>\
<meta charset="UTF-8">\
<meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0">\
<title>Chi Siamo \'97 Righetto Immobiliare</title>\
<link href="https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Cormorant+Garamond:ital,wght@0,300;0,400;0,600;1,300;1,400&family=Montserrat:wght@200;300;400;500;600&display=swap" rel="stylesheet">\
<style>\
  *, *::before, *::after \{ box-sizing: border-box; margin: 0; padding: 0; \}\
\
  :root \{\
    --navy: #0D1B2A;\
    --navy2: #3A5578;\
    --orange: #E67E22;\
    --lime: #CEE08F;\
    --gold: #C9A96E;\
    --cream: #F5F0E8;\
    --white: #FFFFFF;\
  \}\
\
  body \{\
    background: var(--navy);\
    font-family: 'Montserrat', sans-serif;\
    overflow-x: hidden;\
  \}\
\
  /* \uc0\u9472 \u9472  CINEMATIC SECTION \u9472 \u9472  */\
  .cinematic \{\
    position: relative;\
    width: 100%;\
    height: 100vh;\
    overflow: hidden;\
    background: #000;\
  \}\
\
  /* SLIDE SHOW */\
  .slide \{\
    position: absolute;\
    inset: 0;\
    background-size: cover;\
    background-position: center;\
    opacity: 0;\
    transform: scale(1.08);\
    transition: opacity 1.4s cubic-bezier(.4,0,.2,1), transform 8s cubic-bezier(.25,.1,.25,1);\
    will-change: opacity, transform;\
  \}\
  .slide.active \{\
    opacity: 1;\
    transform: scale(1);\
  \}\
  .slide::after \{\
    content: '';\
    position: absolute;\
    inset: 0;\
    background: linear-gradient(\
      to bottom,\
      rgba(13,27,42,0.15) 0%,\
      rgba(13,27,42,0.05) 30%,\
      rgba(13,27,42,0.55) 70%,\
      rgba(13,27,42,0.92) 100%\
    );\
  \}\
\
  /* DECORATIVE CORNER LINES */\
  .corner-tl, .corner-br \{\
    position: absolute;\
    width: 80px;\
    height: 80px;\
    z-index: 10;\
    opacity: 0;\
    animation: fadeInCorner 1s ease 1.5s forwards;\
  \}\
  .corner-tl \{ top: 40px; left: 40px; border-top: 1.5px solid var(--gold); border-left: 1.5px solid var(--gold); \}\
  .corner-br \{ bottom: 40px; right: 40px; border-bottom: 1.5px solid var(--gold); border-right: 1.5px solid var(--gold); \}\
  @keyframes fadeInCorner \{ to \{ opacity: 0.7; \} \}\
\
  /* PROGRESS BAR */\
  .progress-bar \{\
    position: absolute;\
    bottom: 0;\
    left: 0;\
    height: 2px;\
    background: linear-gradient(90deg, var(--gold), var(--orange));\
    width: 0%;\
    z-index: 20;\
    transition: none;\
  \}\
  .progress-bar.animate \{\
    transition: width 4s linear;\
    width: 100%;\
  \}\
\
  /* SLIDE COUNTER */\
  .slide-counter \{\
    position: absolute;\
    bottom: 28px;\
    right: 50px;\
    z-index: 20;\
    font-family: 'Montserrat', sans-serif;\
    font-size: 10px;\
    letter-spacing: 3px;\
    color: rgba(255,255,255,0.5);\
  \}\
  .slide-counter span \{ color: var(--gold); font-weight: 600; \}\
\
  /* \uc0\u9472 \u9472  OVERLAY TEXT CENTER \u9472 \u9472  */\
  .overlay-text \{\
    position: absolute;\
    inset: 0;\
    z-index: 15;\
    display: flex;\
    flex-direction: column;\
    align-items: center;\
    justify-content: center;\
    padding: 0 20px;\
    text-align: center;\
  \}\
\
  .tagline \{\
    font-family: 'Montserrat', sans-serif;\
    font-size: 10px;\
    font-weight: 600;\
    letter-spacing: 5px;\
    text-transform: uppercase;\
    color: var(--gold);\
    opacity: 0;\
    transform: translateY(20px);\
    animation: riseIn .9s ease 0.8s forwards;\
  \}\
\
  .gold-line \{\
    width: 0;\
    height: 1px;\
    background: linear-gradient(90deg, transparent, var(--gold), transparent);\
    margin: 18px auto;\
    animation: expandLine 1.2s ease 1.2s forwards;\
  \}\
  @keyframes expandLine \{ to \{ width: 200px; \} \}\
\
  .main-title \{\
    font-family: 'Cormorant Garamond', serif;\
    font-weight: 300;\
    font-size: clamp(2.8rem, 6vw, 5.5rem);\
    color: var(--white);\
    line-height: 1.1;\
    opacity: 0;\
    transform: translateY(30px);\
    animation: riseIn 1s ease 1.5s forwards;\
    text-shadow: 0 4px 30px rgba(0,0,0,0.5);\
  \}\
  .main-title em \{\
    font-style: italic;\
    color: var(--gold);\
  \}\
\
  .subtitle \{\
    font-family: 'Cormorant Garamond', serif;\
    font-style: italic;\
    font-weight: 300;\
    font-size: clamp(1rem, 2.2vw, 1.5rem);\
    color: rgba(255,255,255,0.78);\
    margin-top: 14px;\
    opacity: 0;\
    transform: translateY(25px);\
    animation: riseIn 1s ease 2s forwards;\
    max-width: 700px;\
    line-height: 1.6;\
  \}\
\
  @keyframes riseIn \{\
    to \{ opacity: 1; transform: translateY(0); \}\
  \}\
\
  /* ROTATING BADGE */\
  .badge-container \{\
    position: absolute;\
    bottom: 80px;\
    left: 50px;\
    z-index: 20;\
    opacity: 0;\
    animation: fadeInCorner 1s ease 2.5s forwards;\
  \}\
  .badge \{\
    width: 90px;\
    height: 90px;\
    position: relative;\
  \}\
  .badge-ring \{\
    width: 90px;\
    height: 90px;\
    border: 1px solid rgba(201,169,110,0.4);\
    border-radius: 50%;\
    position: absolute;\
    animation: rotateSlow 12s linear infinite;\
  \}\
  .badge-ring::after \{\
    content: '
\f1 \uc0\u9670 
\f0  PADOVA 
\f1 \uc0\u9670 
\f0  DAL 1999 
\f1 \uc0\u9670 
\f0  ECCELLENZA 
\f1 \uc0\u9670 
\f0 ';\
    position: absolute;\
    width: 100%;\
    height: 100%;\
    font-size: 6px;\
    letter-spacing: 2.5px;\
    color: var(--gold);\
    display: flex;\
    align-items: center;\
    justify-content: center;\
    white-space: nowrap;\
  \}\
  .badge-center \{\
    position: absolute;\
    inset: 15px;\
    border: 1px solid rgba(201,169,110,0.6);\
    border-radius: 50%;\
    display: flex;\
    align-items: center;\
    justify-content: center;\
    font-size: 9px;\
    color: var(--gold);\
    letter-spacing: 1px;\
    font-family: 'Cormorant Garamond', serif;\
    font-weight: 600;\
  \}\
  @keyframes rotateSlow \{ to \{ transform: rotate(360deg); \} \}\
\
  /* \uc0\u9472 \u9472  INFO SECTION BELOW \u9472 \u9472  */\
  .info-section \{\
    background: var(--navy);\
    padding: 100px 40px;\
    position: relative;\
    overflow: hidden;\
  \}\
  .info-section::before \{\
    content: '';\
    position: absolute;\
    top: 0; left: 0; right: 0;\
    height: 1px;\
    background: linear-gradient(90deg, transparent, var(--gold), transparent);\
  \}\
\
  .info-grid \{\
    max-width: 1200px;\
    margin: 0 auto;\
    display: grid;\
    grid-template-columns: 1fr 1fr;\
    gap: 80px;\
    align-items: start;\
  \}\
\
  .section-label \{\
    font-size: 9px;\
    letter-spacing: 5px;\
    text-transform: uppercase;\
    color: var(--gold);\
    margin-bottom: 24px;\
    font-weight: 600;\
  \}\
\
  .info-heading \{\
    font-family: 'Cormorant Garamond', serif;\
    font-size: clamp(2rem, 3.5vw, 3rem);\
    font-weight: 300;\
    color: var(--white);\
    line-height: 1.2;\
    margin-bottom: 28px;\
  \}\
  .info-heading em \{ color: var(--gold); font-style: italic; \}\
\
  .info-body \{\
    font-size: 0.85rem;\
    line-height: 1.9;\
    color: rgba(255,255,255,0.6);\
    font-weight: 300;\
  \}\
\
  .quote-block \{\
    margin-top: 36px;\
    padding-left: 24px;\
    border-left: 2px solid var(--gold);\
  \}\
  .quote-text \{\
    font-family: 'Cormorant Garamond', serif;\
    font-size: 1.3rem;\
    font-style: italic;\
    color: var(--cream);\
    line-height: 1.6;\
  \}\
\
  .values-list \{\
    list-style: none;\
    margin-top: 10px;\
  \}\
  .values-list li \{\
    display: flex;\
    gap: 20px;\
    margin-bottom: 36px;\
    padding-bottom: 36px;\
    border-bottom: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.06);\
  \}\
  .values-list li:last-child \{ border-bottom: none; \}\
  .val-num \{\
    font-family: 'Cormorant Garamond', serif;\
    font-size: 2rem;\
    color: var(--gold);\
    opacity: 0.4;\
    line-height: 1;\
    min-width: 36px;\
    font-weight: 300;\
  \}\
  .val-content h4 \{\
    font-size: 0.8rem;\
    letter-spacing: 2px;\
    text-transform: uppercase;\
    color: var(--white);\
    margin-bottom: 8px;\
    font-weight: 500;\
  \}\
  .val-content p \{\
    font-size: 0.82rem;\
    color: rgba(255,255,255,0.55);\
    line-height: 1.7;\
    font-weight: 300;\
  \}\
\
  /* CTA BUTTON */\
  .cta-btn \{\
    display: inline-flex;\
    align-items: center;\
    gap: 12px;\
    margin-top: 48px;\
    padding: 16px 36px;\
    background: transparent;\
    border: 1px solid var(--gold);\
    color: var(--gold);\
    font-family: 'Montserrat', sans-serif;\
    font-size: 10px;\
    letter-spacing: 3px;\
    text-transform: uppercase;\
    text-decoration: none;\
    cursor: pointer;\
    transition: all 0.4s ease;\
    position: relative;\
    overflow: hidden;\
  \}\
  .cta-btn::before \{\
    content: '';\
    position: absolute;\
    inset: 0;\
    background: var(--gold);\
    transform: scaleX(0);\
    transform-origin: left;\
    transition: transform 0.4s ease;\
    z-index: -1;\
  \}\
  .cta-btn:hover \{ color: var(--navy); \}\
  .cta-btn:hover::before \{ transform: scaleX(1); \}\
\
  /* SCROLL INDICATOR */\
  .scroll-hint \{\
    position: absolute;\
    bottom: 36px;\
    left: 50%;\
    transform: translateX(-50%);\
    z-index: 20;\
    display: flex;\
    flex-direction: column;\
    align-items: center;\
    gap: 8px;\
    opacity: 0;\
    animation: fadeInCorner 1s ease 3s forwards;\
  \}\
  .scroll-hint span \{\
    font-size: 8px;\
    letter-spacing: 3px;\
    color: rgba(255,255,255,0.4);\
    text-transform: uppercase;\
  \}\
  .scroll-line \{\
    width: 1px;\
    height: 40px;\
    background: linear-gradient(to bottom, var(--gold), transparent);\
    animation: scrollPulse 2s ease-in-out infinite;\
  \}\
  @keyframes scrollPulse \{\
    0%, 100% \{ opacity: 0.4; transform: scaleY(1); \}\
    50% \{ opacity: 1; transform: scaleY(0.6); \}\
  \}\
\
  /* BG DECORATION */\
  .bg-decoration \{\
    position: absolute;\
    right: -200px;\
    top: 50%;\
    transform: translateY(-50%);\
    width: 600px;\
    height: 600px;\
    border: 1px solid rgba(201,169,110,0.05);\
    border-radius: 50%;\
    pointer-events: none;\
  \}\
  .bg-decoration::before \{\
    content: '';\
    position: absolute;\
    inset: 60px;\
    border: 1px solid rgba(201,169,110,0.04);\
    border-radius: 50%;\
  \}\
</style>\
</head>\
<body>\
\
<!-- 
\f2 \'a8\'54\'a8\'54\'a8\'54\'a8\'54\'a8\'54\'a8\'54\'a8\'54\'a8\'54\'a8\'54\'a8\'54\'a8\'54\'a8\'54\'a8\'54\'a8\'54\'a8\'54\'a8\'54\'a8\'54\'a8\'54\'a8\'54\'a8\'54\'a8\'54\'a8\'54\'a8\'54\'a8\'54\'a8\'54\'a8\'54\'a8\'54\'a8\'54\'a8\'54\'a8\'54\'a8\'54\'a8\'54\'a8\'54\'a8\'54\'a8\'54\'a8\'54
\f0 \
     CINEMATIC SECTION\

\f2 \'a8\'54\'a8\'54\'a8\'54\'a8\'54\'a8\'54\'a8\'54\'a8\'54\'a8\'54\'a8\'54\'a8\'54\'a8\'54\'a8\'54\'a8\'54\'a8\'54\'a8\'54\'a8\'54\'a8\'54\'a8\'54\'a8\'54\'a8\'54\'a8\'54\'a8\'54\'a8\'54\'a8\'54\'a8\'54\'a8\'54\'a8\'54\'a8\'54\'a8\'54\'a8\'54\'a8\'54\'a8\'54\'a8\'54\'a8\'54\'a8\'54\'a8\'54
\f0  -->\
<section class="cinematic" id="chiSiamo">\
\
  <!-- Slides -->\
  <div class="slide active" style="background-image: url('data:image/jpeg;base64,')"></div>\
  <div class="slide" style="background-image: url('data:image/jpeg;base64,')"></div>\
  <div class="slide" style="background-image: url('data:image/jpeg;base64,')"></div>\
  <div class="slide" style="background-image: url('data:image/jpeg;base64,')"></div>\
  <div class="slide" style="background-image: url('data:image/jpeg;base64,')"></div>\
\
  <!-- Corner decorations -->\
  <div class="corner-tl"></div>\
  <div class="corner-br"></div>\
\
  <!-- Overlay text -->\
  <div class="overlay-text">\
    <p class="tagline">Righetto Immobiliare \'b7 Padova \'b7 Est. 1999</p>\
    <div class="gold-line"></div>\
    <h1 class="main-title">Eccellenza &amp; <em>Visione</em><br>al Servizio del Tuo Futuro</h1>\
    <p class="subtitle">Oltre 25 anni di esperienza nel mercato immobiliare della provincia di Padova</p>\
  </div>\
\
  <!-- Badge rotating -->\
  <div class="badge-container">\
    <div class="badge">\
      <div class="badge-ring"></div>\
      <div class="badge-center">RI</div>\
    </div>\
  </div>\
\
  <!-- Progress bar -->\
  <div class="progress-bar animate" id="progressBar"></div>\
\
  <!-- Slide counter -->\
  <div class="slide-counter">\
    <span id="currentSlide">01</span> / 05\
  </div>\
\
  <!-- Scroll hint -->\
  <div class="scroll-hint">\
    <span>Scopri</span>\
    <div class="scroll-line"></div>\
  </div>\
\
</section>\
\
<!-- 
\f2 \'a8\'54\'a8\'54\'a8\'54\'a8\'54\'a8\'54\'a8\'54\'a8\'54\'a8\'54\'a8\'54\'a8\'54\'a8\'54\'a8\'54\'a8\'54\'a8\'54\'a8\'54\'a8\'54\'a8\'54\'a8\'54\'a8\'54\'a8\'54\'a8\'54\'a8\'54\'a8\'54\'a8\'54\'a8\'54\'a8\'54\'a8\'54\'a8\'54\'a8\'54\'a8\'54\'a8\'54\'a8\'54\'a8\'54\'a8\'54\'a8\'54\'a8\'54
\f0 \
     INFO SECTION\

\f2 \'a8\'54\'a8\'54\'a8\'54\'a8\'54\'a8\'54\'a8\'54\'a8\'54\'a8\'54\'a8\'54\'a8\'54\'a8\'54\'a8\'54\'a8\'54\'a8\'54\'a8\'54\'a8\'54\'a8\'54\'a8\'54\'a8\'54\'a8\'54\'a8\'54\'a8\'54\'a8\'54\'a8\'54\'a8\'54\'a8\'54\'a8\'54\'a8\'54\'a8\'54\'a8\'54\'a8\'54\'a8\'54\'a8\'54\'a8\'54\'a8\'54\'a8\'54
\f0  -->\
<section class="info-section">\
  <div class="bg-decoration"></div>\
  <div class="info-grid">\
\
    <div>\
      <p class="section-label">La Nostra Storia</p>\
      <h2 class="info-heading">Impronta artigianale,<br><em>visione contemporanea</em></h2>\
      <p class="info-body">\
        Righetto Immobiliare nasce dalla passione per il territorio e dalla convinzione che ogni immobile racconti una storia unica. Non siamo una semplice agenzia: siamo il partner ideale per chi vuole comprare, vendere o investire con piena consapevolezza nel mercato padovano.<br><br>\
        Gestiamo trattative di alta complessit\'e0 \'97 appartamenti di pregio, ville esclusive, uffici direzionali, immobili commerciali. Dalla prima consulenza all'atto notarile, il nostro team si occupa di tutto.\
      </p>\
      <div class="quote-block">\
        <p class="quote-text">"Ogni spazio merita di essere trasformato in un'esperienza."</p>\
      </div>\
      <a href="#contatti" class="cta-btn">\
        Richiedi consulenza\
        <svg width="14" height="10" viewBox="0 0 14 10" fill="none">\
          <path d="M8 1L13 5M13 5L8 9M13 5H1" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="1.2" stroke-linecap="round"/>\
        </svg>\
      </a>\
    </div>\
\
    <div>\
      <p class="section-label">I Nostri Valori</p>\
      <ul class="values-list">\
        <li>\
          <span class="val-num">01</span>\
          <div class="val-content">\
            <h4>Eccellenza senza compromessi</h4>\
            <p>Selezioniamo le migliori propriet\'e0, i migliori professionisti, le migliori soluzioni. La qualit\'e0 \'e8 nella cura dei dettagli.</p>\
          </div>\
        </li>\
        <li>\
          <span class="val-num">02</span>\
          <div class="val-content">\
            <h4>Trasparenza totale</h4>\
            <p>Budget definito, timeline chiara, comunicazione costante. Nessuna sorpresa, solo risultati concreti.</p>\
          </div>\
        </li>\
        <li>\
          <span class="val-num">03</span>\
          <div class="val-content">\
            <h4>Responsabilit\'e0 unica</h4>\
            <p>Un solo referente per tutto il percorso. Zero rimpalli, zero alibi. Se qualcosa non va, lo risolviamo noi.</p>\
          </div>\
        </li>\
      </ul>\
    </div>\
\
  </div>\
</section>\
\
<script>\
  const slides = document.querySelectorAll('.slide');\
  const progress = document.getElementById('progressBar');\
  const counter = document.getElementById('currentSlide');\
  let current = 0;\
  const total = slides.length;\
  const INTERVAL = 4200;\
\
  function goTo(n) \{\
    slides[current].classList.remove('active');\
    current = (n + total) % total;\
    slides[current].classList.add('active');\
    counter.textContent = String(current + 1).padStart(2, '0');\
\
    // Reset + restart progress bar\
    progress.classList.remove('animate');\
    progress.style.transition = 'none';\
    progress.style.width = '0%';\
    void progress.offsetWidth; // reflow\
    progress.style.transition = `width $\{INTERVAL\}ms linear`;\
    progress.style.width = '100%';\
  \}\
\
  // Initial progress\
  setTimeout(() => \{\
    progress.style.transition = `width $\{INTERVAL\}ms linear`;\
    progress.style.width = '100%';\
  \}, 100);\
\
  setInterval(() => goTo(current + 1), INTERVAL);\
\
  // Scroll reveal for info section\
  const observer = new IntersectionObserver((entries) => \{\
    entries.forEach(e => \{\
      if (e.isIntersecting) \{\
        e.target.style.opacity = '1';\
        e.target.style.transform = 'translateY(0)';\
      \}\
    \});\
  \}, \{ threshold: 0.15 \});\
\
  document.querySelectorAll('.values-list li, .info-heading, .info-body, .quote-block').forEach(el => \{\
    el.style.opacity = '0';\
    el.style.transform = 'translateY(30px)';\
    el.style.transition = 'opacity 0.8s ease, transform 0.8s ease';\
    observer.observe(el);\
  \});\
</script>\
</body>\
</html>}
